member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.IUltDecoderPlugin
member.summary: An plugin interface for the different types of UltDecoders.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.IUltDecoderPlugin.Initialize(System.String)
member.summary: Initialize the plugin with the user's provided input.
member.param: The user's input from the "twin" parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.IUltDecoderPlugin.VerifyExpectedBinCount(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Verifies if the user's provided expected count.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.IUltDecoderPlugin.Decode(System.String,System.String,Prime.BusinessLogic.FuseLogicCollection.UltDecoderBasic.Ult.CtvsOrder,System.UInt32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Executes the ult decoding.
member.param: The current instances results for the ongoing DUT session.
The binary data to decode for the current .
member.returns: If the decoding was success or not.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.IUltDecoderPlugin.CheckUltWithVidInUbe(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: function to check VID using ULT to match in UBE file.
member.param: the dieID that need to match with decoded ult..

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.IUltDecoderPlugin.PrintNoValueVidVerification(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: function to print no value for Vid Verification.
member.param: the dieID that need to match with decoded ult..

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.TsmcUltDecoderPlugin
member.summary: Tsmc's specific UltDecoder plugin implementation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.TsmcUltDecoderPlugin.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.UltDecoderPlugin
member.summary: Intel's specific UltDecoder plugin implementation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.UltDecoderPlugin.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.IUltDecoderExtensions
member.summary: Class to define extendable methods.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.IUltDecoderExtensions.CustomPostProcessResults(Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.UltDecoderTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: Called right after successful execution to allow the user to post process exit port, CTV results, and functional results.
member.param: The object for holding the exit port, CTV results, and functional results.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.IUltDecoderExtensions.CreateTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Called prior to any test in Execute to generate the test instance results object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.IUltDecoderExtensions.GetDynamicPinMask
member.summary: Gets the list of pins to mask execution after execution. The test method will merge this list with the ones from the test instance parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod
member.summary: Ult decode test method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.IUltDecoderPlugin)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.EnabledDisabledModes
member.summary: Settings to enable or disable.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.EnabledDisabledModes.Enabled
member.summary: Enable.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.EnabledDisabledModes.Disabled
member.summary: Disable.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.CtvsOrder
member.summary: CTVs order options for decoding.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.CtvsOrder.Msb
member.summary: Most Significant Bit first.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.CtvsOrder.Lsb
member.summary: Least Significant Bit first.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.CapturePins
member.summary: Gets or sets pins name for CTV capture. Comma separated list of pins for CTV capture one for each Die Id. Use capture pins empty when you use UserVarsList parameter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.ExpectedBitCount
member.summary: Gets or sets expected total bit count.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.DieIdNames
member.summary: Gets or sets the Name Die Id name. When DieIdName match PackageEfuse, ULT info will print to ituff as trlot, trwafer, trxloc, tryloc. When DieIdName not match PackageEfuse or PackageEfuse is empty, this ituff will not printed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.PackageEfuse
member.summary: Gets or sets DieId Name to print ituff as PackageEfuse. PackageEfuse is used with DieIdNames. When DieIdName match PackageEfuse, ULT info will print to ituff as trlot, trwafer, trxloc, tryloc. When DieIdName not match PackageEfuse or PackageEfuse is empty, this ituff will not printed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.Offset
member.summary: Gets or sets list of offsets to start ctvs decoding. If one value is given it will be use as offsets for all Ctvs. Default is 0 (zero).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.UserVarsList
member.summary: Gets or sets list of comma separated userVarNames in the format of collection.userVarName variables. Can also use SharedStorage keys separated by commas.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.CtvOrder
member.summary: Gets or sets CTVs order for decoding.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.PrintUltDataPerDieIdToItuff
member.summary: Gets or sets if the current instance has to print the ult data per die id to the ituff. Set as ENABLED to print ULT info to ituff as sstrlot, sstrwafer, sstrxloc, sstryloc. Set as DISABLED to not print this ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.UploadUltToDffService
member.summary: Gets or sets if decoded Ult has to upload to DffService..

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.UltDecoderPluginName
member.summary: Gets or sets the UltDecoderPlugin name to use. If empty, the default will be used ().

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.UltPluginUserInput
member.summary: Gets or sets DieId Name to print ituff as UltPluginUserInput. DieId Ult info will print under trlot, trwafer, trxloc, tryloc.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.ProcessCtvAndUltData(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Process CTV and ult data.
member.param: Ctv data with capture pin as key and ctv data as value.
member.returns: Test methods pass or fail port.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.ExecuteOnlyDecoder
member.summary: Executes decoder portion of execute.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltDecoderTestMethod.Bootstrapper
member.summary: Bootstrapper.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.UltDecoderTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Class to allow proper user modification of exit port.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.UltDecoderTestInstanceResults.FunctionalResult
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether functional execution passes or fails.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.UltDecoderTestInstanceResults.CtvResults
member.summary: Gets or sets CTV results.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltEncoderTestMethod
member.summary: Ult encode test method. Use to encode ult to 50, 56 and 64 bits.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltEncoderTestMethod.BitCount
member.summary: Gets or sets expected bit count.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltEncoderTestMethod.DieIdName
member.summary: Gets or sets the Name Die Id name, use when data are taken from share storage.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltEncoderTestMethod.UserVarForLotName
member.summary: Gets or sets user var name for lot number.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltEncoderTestMethod.UserVarForWafer
member.summary: Gets or sets user var name for wafer.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltEncoderTestMethod.UserVarForXCoordinate
member.summary: Gets or sets user var name for x coordinate.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltEncoderTestMethod.UserVarForYCoordinate
member.summary: Gets or sets user var name for x coordinate.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltEncoderTestMethod.TargetUserVar
member.summary: Gets or sets user var name for save the result.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.UltEncoderDecoder.PrimeUltEncoderTestMethod.CtvOrder
member.summary: Gets or sets CTVs order for decoding.
